boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the cloud operator execute the infrastructure or privileged-admin action now? Focus: database schema destructive migration.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact current source records close the boundary.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open source defect remains before execution.

final_answer: Source records close the exact destructive-migration boundary. The controlling control record confirms the current migration approval and rollback plan match, and policy permits execution only when current records close the boundary. No source defect remains, so the cloud operator may proceed without escalation.
